PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: trauma
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Physical suffering - missing parts, deep scars, chronic pain.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: loss
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Dead relations, destroyed homes, severed bonds.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: grief
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Loss that hasn't been processed. The wound still open.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: decay
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Addiction, dementia, age - the body or mind wearing down.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: isolation
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A pawn who stands apart - by choice, nature, or circumstance.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: violence
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A history of killing. Bloodlust, high kill counts, berserker tendencies.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: underworld
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Criminal background, addiction, shady origins.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: betrayal
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Trust was broken - by others or by [pawn_pronoun]self.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: augmentation
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Bionics and implants - the line between flesh and machine blurring.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: power
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Psycasts, royal authority, deep spiritual bonds.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: duty
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Military training, royal title, loyalty above self.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: devotion
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Ideological conviction. Beliefs that shape every action.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: faith
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Deep religious commitment. The true believer, the moralist, the shepherd.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: noble
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: High-born blood, royal lineage, or the ghost of a fallen empire.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: leadership
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Natural commander, someone others instinctively follow.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: survival
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Refugee origins, starvation, someone who fought just to exist.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: wandering
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: No fixed home, no lasting roots. Still looking for something.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: refugee
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Driven from home by war, disaster, or persecution.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: pacifism
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A refusal of violence - principled, traumatised, or simply gentle.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: kinship
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Strong bonds, living family, something worth protecting.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: craft
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A maker - expresses themselves through building and creating.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: curiosity
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: High intellect, multiple passions, the drive to understand.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: nurture
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A healer, a carer - tends to people, animals, and trees.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: resilience
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Still standing after mental breaks, near-death, and long years.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: scholar
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A seeker of knowledge, researcher, or intellectual.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: artist
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Expresses themselves through beauty, music, or creation.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: animal friend
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: Deep bond with animals - handler, trainer, or beast whisperer.

PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.label: healer
PawnChronicles.NarrativeTagDef.description: A doctor, medic, or natural caretaker of the injured.
